title: Scola Washable PVA Kids Glue, 150ml, School Supplies, Art and Crafts Projects, Children's Craft Projects, For Kids
features: Easily washes off hands and most surfaces with water
Suitable for various materials including paper, cardboard, fabric, and more
Provides a reliable and durable bond for sticking materials together securely
description: From the manufacturer Scola - The Education Arts & Crafts Manufacturer Scola manufactures and supplies the largest range of paints, crayons, modelling materials & adhesives for the UK education market. The brand name Scola has become synonymous with quality products that are safe, good value and easy to use for the education market. Scola Product Ranges Paint Scola Paints includes a wide variety that are ideal for the education market. Chalks & Crayons The Scola Chalks & Crayons ranges are perfect for Early Education & Primary Schools. Crafts & Papers The Scola Crafts range includes a large variety of papers and embellishments that can tackle any craft projects that your students & children want to tackle. Adhesives Ideal to stick papers, fabrics, crafts and collage materials together or for making slime, the Scola Adhesives range is the most used glue in UK Early Education & Primary Schools. Mediums The Scola Mediums range includes versatile solutions for teachers and schools. Achieve lasting, vibrant colours that stay brilliant once dry! Modelling Scola Modelling Doughs & Clays are famous for the vibrant colours and large range of uses. Scola's famous Colour Clays are ideal for both Primary & Secondary Schools. Teaching Aids Drying racks, splash matts, caddies, aprons and dry wipe poster papers complete the Scola Teaching Aids range. The products are ideal for Early Education & Primary Schools. Display Products Make any classroom shine with a large variety of Scola Display Products! From a Christmas fireplace display to rolls, borders, and display accent designs, the classroom will always be inspirational.
